title: Cloudflare Worker auth proxy
description: Create workers/auth/ with /exchange and /refresh endpoints. Worker holds SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET as secret. POST /exchange accepts {code, code_verifier, redirect_uri}, calls Spotify token endpoint with client_id+client_secret. POST /refresh accepts {refresh_token}, returns new access_token. CORS policy: only accept requests from ALLOWED_ORIGIN. Include wrangler.toml.

title: Typed Spotify API client
description: Implement src/lib/spotify/client.ts: typed wrapper around Spotify Web API. Must handle: user profile, user playlists (with pagination), playlist tracks (with pagination), top artists/tracks by time range, recently played. All responses typed in src/lib/spotify/types.ts. Uses access_token from auth store. Auto-refreshes token on 401. All API calls mocked in tests.

title: .env.example and environment configuration
description: Create .env.example with all env vars from PROJECT.md. Configure SvelteKit to use PUBLIC_ prefix vars. Set up APP_ENV-based redirect URI selection. Ensure SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET never appears in frontend code.

title: wa-sqlite + OPFS database setup with Web Worker
description: Set up wa-sqlite compiled to WebAssembly running in a dedicated Web Worker (src/lib/db/worker.ts). Use OPFS for durable storage. Implement schema.ts with the exact SQL schema from PROJECT.md (playlists, tracks, playlist_tracks, recent_plays tables with all indexes). Implement idempotent migrations. Do NOT use DuckDB-wasm.

title: PKCE auth helpers and token management
description: Implement src/lib/auth/pkce.ts with code_verifier/code_challenge generation (SHA-256). Implement src/lib/auth/tokens.ts for token storage (access_token in memory store, refresh_token in localStorage, code_verifier in sessionStorage). Implement proactive token refresh when within 60s of expiry. Include src/lib/spotify/scopes.ts with required scopes.

title: Auth callback page and Svelte auth store
description: Implement /auth/callback/+page.svelte: validate state nonce, retrieve code_verifier from sessionStorage, POST to Worker /exchange endpoint. Implement src/lib/stores/auth.ts Svelte store with login/logout/refresh logic. Connect Spotify button on root page. Clear all tokens on logout. Depends on PKCE helpers and CF Worker.

title: SvelteKit project scaffold with routing and Tailwind
description: Initialize SvelteKit SPA with static adapter. Set up file-based routing for: root redirect, /search, /analytics, /auth/callback. Configure Tailwind CSS. Create workspace root package.json. Follow the directory structure from PROJECT.md (apps/web/).

title: Phase 1 tests - Auth and Foundation
description: Implement all Phase 1 required test cases from PROJECT.md: PKCE code_verifier/code_challenge known-vector test, state nonce validation, token exchange calls Worker correctly, token refresh triggered within 60s of expiry, token refresh retries on 401 exactly once then fails, wa-sqlite+OPFS init and idempotent schema migrations. Use Vitest. All Spotify API calls mocked.

title: Auth callback page and Svelte auth store
description: Implement /auth/callback/+page.svelte: validate state nonce, retrieve code_verifier from sessionStorage, POST to Worker /exchange endpoint. Implement src/lib/stores/auth.ts Svelte store with login/logout/refresh logic. Connect Spotify button on root page. Clear all tokens on logout.
